<!--
Thanks for the contribution! A few notes:

1. PR titles and commit messages must follow Conventional Commits
   (feat:, fix:, perf:, docs:, chore:, ci:, test:, refactor:, build:,
   style:, revert:). The release pipeline derives version + CHANGELOG
   from these prefixes.
2. `make check` should pass locally before requesting review.
3. If you have a private package index configured globally, see
   CONTRIBUTING.md for the env vars to export.
-->
